scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: npx concurrently "PORT=5000 npm start --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "PORT=5000 npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
